COMMON.PURCHASE_ERROR: Could not complete the purchase. Please try again.
COMMON.REMOVE_ADS_DESCRIPTION: Remove ads forever and enable lossless/compressed export selection.
COMMON.RESTORE_ERROR: Could not restore purchases. Please try again.
COMMON.SHARE_KINDLE_HINT: When sharing, select the Kindle app to send it to your device.

CREATE.ADS_REQUIRED: The ad could not be loaded. Check your network or ad blocker.
CREATE.COVER_CREATED: Cover created. You can now save or share
CREATE.HINT_SAVE_SHARE_EXPLAIN: Creating the cover does not save it automatically.
CREATE.INFO_SHARE_KINDLE: To send it to your Kindle, select the Kindle app when sharing.
CREATE.INFO_STEP_2: Adjust the image in the editor and tap Done to apply it.
CREATE.INFO_STEP_3: Create the cover after the adjustment is applied.
CREATE.IMAGE_ERROR_CORRUPT: The image could not be read. Please try another one.
CREATE.IMAGE_ERROR_SIZE: The file is too large. Maximum {{maxSize}} MB.
CREATE.IMAGE_ERROR_TYPE: Unsupported format ({{type}}). Please select JPG, PNG, or WebP.
CREATE.IMAGE_WARN_SMALL: The image resolution is lower than the selected Kindle model. For better results, use a larger image.
CREATE.SAVE_RENAME_MESSAGE: Enter a name for the cover
CREATE.TITLE: Create cover
CREATE.INFO_REQUIREMENT_ENABLE_COVER_DISPLAY: Enable "Screen and brightness > Show covers on lock screen" on Kindle.

COVERS.TITLE: Covers
COVERS.DITHERED_THUMBNAIL_NOTICE: Covers with artifact reduction may look different in thumbnails. Open preview to see a more accurate result.

DELETE.MESSAGE: Do you want to delete this cover?
DELETE.TITLE: Delete cover

ERROR.DELETE: Could not delete the cover. Please try again.
ERROR.LOAD: Could not load your covers. Pull down to refresh.
ERROR.PREVIEW: Could not load the preview. Please try again.
ERROR.SHARE: Could not share the cover. Please try again.
ERROR.OPEN: Could not open the cover. Please try again.

INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_1: Select an image for your cover
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_2: Adjust the image in the editor and tap Done to apply it
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_3: Create the cover after the adjustment is applied
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_4_DESC: Once it is ready, you can save it on your device or share it to the Kindle app for a smoother flow.
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_5_DESC: You can also send it from your browser using the Send to Kindle web tool.
INSTRUCTIONS.TIP: For best results, use high-resolution images and make sure ads are disabled on your Kindle.
INSTRUCTIONS.TITLE: Instructions

REQUISITES.ADS_DESC: Ads must be disabled on the device for the cover to appear on the lock screen.
REQUISITES.APP_DESC: The Kindle app is required to send and view the cover on the device.
REQUISITES.COVER_DESC: Enable the option to show the current book cover on the lock screen.
REQUISITES.NOTE: Cover Creator for Kindle is not an official app and does not modify the device software.
REQUISITES.TITLE: Requisites

CONTROLS.INTERACT_HINT: Interact with the highlighted element to continue.

DEVICE.TITLE: Device
DEVICE.DESCRIPTION:
First, select your device.
This ensures the cover is created at the correct resolution.

IMAGE.TITLE: Cover image
IMAGE.DESCRIPTION: Select the image for your cover.

ADJUST.TITLE: Adjust
ADJUST.DESCRIPTION: Adjust the image in the editor and tap Done.

EXPORT.TITLE: Export quality
EXPORT.DESCRIPTION: Free export uses Standard. Remove ads to unlock export selection (Lossless/Compressed).

REMOVE_ADS_CLOSE.TITLE: Close for now
REMOVE_ADS_CLOSE.DESCRIPTION: For now, enjoy the free version. You are not obligated to buy.

DONE.TITLE: All set
DONE.DESCRIPTION:
Done.
You now know how to create covers with CCFK.

SETTINGS.INSTRUCTIONS_HINT: How to create and send a cover for Kindle
SETTINGS.LANGUAGE_RESTART_NOTICE: Language changed. The app will restart to apply changes.
SETTINGS.LANGUAGE_PREPARING_COUNTDOWN: Preparing everything in your language. The app will close to change its name ({{count}})
SETTINGS.PRIVACY_HINT: Control how data and advertising are handled
SETTINGS.EREADER_OPTIMIZATION_HINT: Apply automatic adjustments to improve clarity on eReaders
SETTINGS.REQUISITES_HINT: Required settings for covers to work correctly on Kindle
SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
